Item Name: Organic Way Tulsi/Holy Basil (Rama) Cut & Sifted (Ocimum tenuiflorum) - Herbal Tea | USDA & Kosher Certified | Vegan, Non GMO & Gluten Free | Resealable Bag | 100% Raw from India (1/2LBS / 8Oz) Bullet Point 1: 100% tested USDA and Kosher certified herbal product Bullet Point 2: Organic products imported from India and packaged in USA Bullet Point 3: Authentic Cut & Sifted Tulsi processed in a hygienic environment Bullet Point 4: The packaging is flavor-sealed for freshness Bullet Point 5: 100% Product satisfaction guarantee Product Description:

Tulsi (Rama) Cut & Sifted can be used for multiple things. It is best used in beverages specially for healing purposes. It has a fantastic aroma with a mild mint and pepper flavor.

Rama Tulsi is traditionally taken as an herbal tea. Tulsi tea has numerous health benefits-both mental and physical. Sipping on herbal tea has two advantages-water hydrates the body and tea infusions gives health benefits like stress relief and immunity.

Essential oil can also be prepared from dried and processed tulsi. Organic Way does not use any additional flavors or artificial additives in any of its spices.

Value: 8.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: This product positions itself as a mid-to-premium organic herbal tea ingredient, leveraging USDA Organic and Kosher certifications for trust and quality assurance. The resealable packaging enhances perceived value by maintaining freshness, while the cut-and-sifted form and absence of additives cater to health-conscious consumers. Despite being imported and processed under hygienic conditions, the lack of luxury branding or limited-edition claims keeps it from high-end positioning, targeting health-focused buyers seeking authenticity and purity.
